overview: Inetutils could allow unintended access to network services.
description:
Kyu Neushwaistein discovered that telnetd in Inetutils incorrectly handled
certain environment variables. A remote attacker could use this issue to
bypass authentication and open a session as an administrator.

bypass authentication and open a session as an administrator.
full_text:
Ubuntu Security Notices

USN-7992-1

 

 

 

 

 

 
USN-7992-1: Inetutils vulnerability

 

 

 

 
Publication date

 

 

 
2 February 2026

 

 

 

 

 
Overview

 

 

 
Inetutils could allow unintended access to network services.

 

 

 

 

 
Releases

 

 

 

 25.10

 24.04 LTS

22.04 LTS

 

 

 

 

 

 

 Open side navigation
 

 

 
Packages

 

 inetutils - Collection of common network programs
 

 

 
Details

 

 

Kyu Neushwaistein discovered that telnetd in Inetutils incorrectly handled
certain environment variables. A remote attacker could use this issue to
bypass authentication and open a session as an administrator.

 

 

 

Kyu Neushwaistein discovered that telnetd in Inetutils incorrectly handled
certain environment variables. A remote attacker could use this issue to
bypass authentication and open a session as an administrator.

 

 

 

 
Update instructions

 

 

 

 

In general, a standard system update will make all the necessary changes.

 Learn more about how to get the fixes.
 

 

 

 

 
The problem can be corrected by updating your system to the following package versions:

 

 

 

 

 Ubuntu Release
 Package Version
 

 25.10

questing

 inetutils-telnetd – 

2:2.6-1ubuntu3.1

 

 24.04

LTS noble

 inetutils-telnetd – 

2:2.5-3ubuntu4.1

 

 22.04

LTS jammy

 inetutils-telnetd – 

2:2.2-2ubuntu0.2

 

Reduce your security exposure

 

 Ubuntu Pro provides ten-year security coverage to 25,000+ packages in Main and Universe repositories, and it is free for up to five machines.
 

 

 Get Ubuntu Pro
